Act as a Senior Product Manager, Senior UI/UX Designer, Senior React Developer, and Software Architect.

Build a production-quality Project Update Dashboard web application that fulfills the following assignment requirements exactly.

PROJECT GOAL

Create a modern, responsive Project Update Dashboard that users can actually use to manage projects and tasks.

This is NOT a static mockup.

The application must be fully functional and demonstrate:

CRUD operations
Dashboard analytics
Form validation
State management
Responsive design
Data persistence
Reusable components
AI-assisted feature
TECH STACK

Use:

React 19
Vite
TypeScript
Tailwind CSS
Shadcn/UI
React Hook Form
Zod Validation
Framer Motion
React Icons
Recharts
Zustand for state management
LocalStorage persistence

Folder structure must be scalable and production-ready.
